source_jobs.title: Technical Support Engineer (PT time zone)
source_jobs.description:
YOUR ROLE

As a Technical Support Engineer at Turnkey, you’ll help developers integrate, debug, and succeed with our SDKs and APIs across a range of environments — from React and mobile apps to backend servers and CLI tools. You’ll be the front line of technical expertise for customers building the next generation of crypto products on Turnkey.

You’ll spend your days reading code, investigating issues, and helping developers get unblocked fast — all while spotting opportunities to make our SDKs, docs, and platform better for everyone.

This is a deeply technical, hands-on role that blends debugging skill, customer empathy, and systems thinking. It’s perfect for someone who loves problem-solving, thrives in fast-moving contexts, and wants to be part of a team that sets the gold standard for developer experience.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Triage, troubleshoot, and resolve customer issues across our SDKs and APIs covering web, mobile, and backend integrations

 - Debug integrations across a variety of platforms and languages

 - Identify, reproduce, and document bugs, partnering with engineering to drive them to resolution

 - Support customers in setting up and verifying integrations, including configuration, auth flows, and signing

 - Create and maintain example code, troubleshooting guides, and internal playbooks

 - Spot patterns in recurring issues and propose fixes or improvements to documentation and SDKs

 - Partner with Product and Engineering to relay feedback and insights from the field

 - Help improve internal tools and processes to scale our technical support function




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 2–6 years of experience in a technical support, solutions engineering, or software engineering role

 - Strong working knowledge of TypeScript and React, with familiarity in React Native or other mobile SDKs

 - Experience debugging APIs (REST, JSON, auth headers, 4xx/5xx errors, etc.)

 - Strong problem-solving skills and comfort digging into unfamiliar systems to find answers

 - Clear, empathetic written and verbal communication

 - Thrives in a fast-paced, startup environment with shifting priorities and lots of context switching

 - Previous experience in the crypto / web3 space




STYLE POINTS

 - Experience supporting developer tools, APIs, or SDKs

 - Prior experience with customer-facing technical roles in crypto, fintech, or security products

 - Familiarity with observability tools (Grafana, Sentry, DataDog) or debugging tools (Postman, Chrome DevTools)

 - Product-minded: you notice friction and think about how to remove it

 - Strong curiosity for how secure infrastructure and crypto key management work




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k)

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will force you to take time off!)

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple team offsites per year

 - Macbook Pro laptop

 - Lunch stipend



Ready to join us on this journey? Email us at jobs@turnkey.com with your LinkedIn profile and a short overview of why you'd be a great fit for Turnkey.



Turnkey is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage individuals of all backgrounds to apply.

source_jobs.title: Engineering - Backend
source_jobs.description:
ENGINEERING




ABOUT US

Turnkey is revolutionizing key management with an API designed for unparalleled security, flexibility, and ease of use in the Web3 ecosystem. Founded by the leaders who scaled Coinbase Custody to over $100M+ ARR, we are rebuilding crypto infrastructure from the ground up, tackling foundational security challenges to empower developers.

Much like AWS transformed computing with the advent of the cloud, Turnkey is building the trustless, transparent, and decentralized infrastructure that will unlock the next wave of mass-market crypto applications, solving the critical challenge of secure, flexible key management.

We are looking for talented engineers who are excited by the radical potential of crypto to change the world for the better. We are generalist engineers and constantly solving new problems and challenges. We are language-agnostic, though we do use Go, Typescript, and Rust in production and while we don't expect you to have a background in every technology we use, we do expect strong fundamentals and experience building scalable infrastructure.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Design and build systems from the ground up without cutting corners on security or usability

 - Develop signing infrastructure and applications to run inside secure computing environments

 - Collaborate effectively across the company to design and deliver the core product

 - Write internal product specifications, external developer documentation, whitepapers, etc.

 - Design and build new product features end-to-end driven by customer requests

 - Assist in scaling out a world-class engineering team

 - Develop thoughtful deployment processes and infrastructure to reduce the risks inherent in the software development lifecycle




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of production engineering experience

 - Experience with one of the following languages: Go, Typescript, or Rust

 - Experience working with AWS, GCP, or other other cloud providers

 - An understanding of modern application architectures with opinions on how they should be developed and deployed

 - Experience building and operating large-scale, mission-critical infrastructure

 - A healthy amount of paranoia :)

 - People who have experience building scaled crypto products




STYLE POINTS

 - Experience developing against TEEs, HSMs, and other secure computing environments

 - A deep understanding of the Linux operating system and how to reduce the surface area of applications deployed on top of it

 - Expertise in threshold signing systems and a desire to stay on the cutting edge of production-grade cryptography

 - Actively tracking developments in the crypto ecosystem and opinionated on where it is going




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) - detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will force you to take time off!)

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple team offsites per year

 - Lunch stipend (for those physically in the New York City office)



Please note that while the team is remote, we are only considering candidates who are physically based in the United States and Canada at the current time.



Turnkey is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage individuals of all backgrounds to apply.

source_jobs.title: Engineering Manager
source_jobs.description:
ENGINEERING MANAGER


Turnkey is a key management API optimized for security, flexibility, and ease-of-use. Founded by the leaders who scaled Coinbase Custody from 0 to a $100M+ ARR business, Turnkey is rewriting the rules of crypto infrastructure by tackling core security at its foundational level. We are building a platform that empowers developers to unlock the next wave of mass-market crypto applications, solving the challenge of secure, flexible key management.


Much like AWS transformed computing with the advent of cloud, Turnkey is the trustless, transparent, and decentralized infrastructure that will transform development in crypto.


We are seeking an Engineering Manager to drive growth throughout our engineering organization. If you’re excited about the potential that web3 has to radically change the world for the better and have a sincere desire to help facilitate that change, join us as we redefine decentralized development.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:




STRATEGIC VISION AND LEADERSHIP

 - Develop and articulate the overarching engineering strategy and technical vision

 - Manage a high-performing engineering team and guide the development of Turnkey’s product and infrastructure

 - Identify and evaluate emerging technologies and trends in web3 and guide their integration into our product and infrastructure

 - Collaborate with leadership to drive recruitment and onboarding of top engineering talent

 - Contribute to overall strategic planning and technical decision making


ARCHITECTURAL OVERSIGHT & TECHNICAL DIRECTION

 - Provide strategic technical guidance and leadership, ensuring intelligent architectural decisions that support our long-term goals

 - Oversee the design and implementation of modern application architectures, optimized for the unique challenges of web3

 - Ensure the scalability, security, and reliability of our infrastructure, addressing the complexities of decentralized systems

 - Contribute to defining and delivering processes that drive quality & consistency to our product & infrastructure development




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Previous managerial experience

 - An understanding of modern application architectures and ability to lead in-depth discussions on how they should be developed and deployed

 - Excellence at holding a high-bar on software and the requisite engineering processes

 - A healthy amount of paranoia :-)
   


STYLE POINTS

 - Prior experience working in fast-paced technology companies

 - Actively tracking developments in the crypto ecosystem and opinionated on where it’s going



WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) - detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will force you to take time off!)

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple team offsites per year

 - Macbook Pro laptop

 - Lunch stipend (for those physically in the New York City office)



Please note that while the team is remote, we are only considering candidates who are physically based in the United States and Canada at the current time.



Turnkey is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage individuals of all backgrounds to apply.

source_jobs.title: Senior Security Engineer, Corporate Security
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Turnkey builds secure, developer-first infrastructure for private key management, making it simple to create wallets, sign transactions, and automate on-chain actions through one elegant API – without ever exposing sensitive key material.


Our mission is to secure the open internet by making strong cryptography and key management the default. Turnkey was founded by the team behind Coinbase Custody – the world’s largest and most secure crypto custodian – whose work has helped protect over $100B in crypto across the industry.


Turnkey's team is low-ego, high-agency, and high-autonomy with more than 100 years of combined experience in cryptography, security, and low-level systems, building reliable infrastructure used at scale.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are hiring a Senior Corporate Security Engineer to own and scale the security of Turnkey's corporate infrastructure. This is a foundational role - you'll be the first dedicated corporate security hire, working diectly with the security lead to build enterprise security capabilities from the ground up.

In this role, you’ll protect Turnkey’s people, endpoints, SaaS, identity systems, and internal
infrastructure, securing our distributed workforce while enabling the team to move quickly without compromising safety. Sitting at the intersection of security engineering, IT operations, and risk management, you’ll design and build security controls that are both robust and user-friendly, ensuring the company remains secure as it scales



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build & Secure Corporate Infrastructure
   
   - Design, implement, and manage security for endpoints and distributed systems; deploy and operate our security stack (MDM, EDR/XDR, ZTNA, SSO); enforce zero-trust principles, least-privilege access, and hardening standards

 - Drive Security Initiatives & Risk Reduction
   
   - Lead initiatives around endpoint hardening, access controls, and vendor risk; conduct security design reviews, risk assessments, and vulnerability remediation; develop and enforce security policies and best practices.

 - Detection, Response & Automation
   
   - Respond to security incidents with urgency and technical depth; collaborate on detection rules, alerts, and monitoring; automate workflows and create runbooks and playbooks to scale security operations efficiently.

 - Foster Security Culture & Education
   
   - Evangelize security best practices, build awareness programs, and partner with teams to embed “secure by default” principles into workflows; serve as a trusted security advisor across the organization.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of experience in corporate and/or enterprise security, IT security, or endpoint security engineering

 - Hands-on experience with:
   
   - MDM Platforms (JAMF, Kandji, Intune, or similar)
   
   - EDR/XDR solutions (Cloudstrike, SentinelOne, Microsoft Defender, etc.)
   
   - Identity and Access Management (Okta, Azure AD/Entra ID, etc.)
   
   - Authentication Protocols (SAML, OAuth, OIDC, SCIM, etc.)
   
   - Zero-trust principles (device trust, conditional access, least-privilege models)

 - Cloud security experience (AWS, GCP)

 - macOS security expertise (architecture, hardening, and fleet management)

 - Security-first mindset with practical knowledge of defense-in-depth and risk-based security




STYLE POINTS

 - Crypto/web3 or FinTech experience

 - Detection/response experience: SIEM, log analysis, threat hunting, or SOC operations

 - Knowledge of modern threat landscape: Adversary TTPs, phishing, insider threats, etc.

 - Security compliance experience: SOC 2, ISO 27001, or similar frameworks




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) - detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will force you to take time off!)

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple

source_jobs.title: Senior Security Engineer, Application Security
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Turnkey builds secure, developer-first infrastructure for private key management, making it simple to create wallets, sign transactions, and automate on-chain actions through one elegant API – without ever exposing sensitive key material.


Our mission is to secure the open internet by making strong cryptography and key management the default. Turnkey was founded by the team behind Coinbase Custody – the world’s largest and most secure crypto custodian – whose work has helped protect over $100B in crypto across the industry.


Turnkey's team is low-ego, high-agency, and high-autonomy with more than 100 years of combined experience in cryptography, security, and low-level systems, building reliable infrastructure used at scale.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are hiring a Senior Application Security Engineer to join Turnkey's team and help ensure our systems, pipelines, and runtime environments are secure by design and resilient at scale.

You'll embed directly with product and infrastructure engineering teams, shaping how security is integrated into every aspect of our architecture. This is a hands-on, builder role ideal for someone who enjoys building secure systems from the ground up.





WHAT YOU’LL DO


You will partner with Product and Engineering at both the design and development stage to ensure that we implement new features securely, including (but not limited to):

 - Participating in the implementation efforts

 - Doing security reviews

 - Helping with product design decisions

 - Auditing and surfacing vulnerabilities in our current products

 - Conducting threat modeling and security assessments for new features and systems, identifying risks early and shaping secure architectural decisions.

 - Developing and improving our Automated Tooling: further enhancing our automated tooling to scale our product security capabilities and find potential code problems both before and after we deploy

 - Making the safe way, the easy way: work on defining and building application guardrails so that developers can build securely by default

 - Investigating and remediating security issues, including vulnerabilities and incidents, and drive long-term improvements to prevent recurrence

 - Embedding a culture of secure development across engineering, defining practices that influence how Turnkey builds, deploys, and maintains systems at scale.

 


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field

 - 5+ years of experience in application or product security, ideally in fast-moving, high-impact or crypto-native environments

 - Strong understanding of web, mobile, and cryptographic security fundamentals (e.g. OWASP Top Ten, SANS/CWE Top 25)

 - Proficiency in programming and scripting languages (Typescript/Javascript, Go, Rust) and
   experience building secure systems from the code up

 - Hands-on experience with security testing tools and methodologies (static/dynamic analysis, pen testing, etc.)

 - Strong understanding of cloud, containerized, and runtime environments (AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes), with the ability to embed security early in the SDLC

 - Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills, with a collaborative mindset for partnering across product and infrastructure teams

 - Curious, proactive, and passionate about building secure, reliable systems in a fast moving startup environment

 - A builder mentality; comfortable operating with ambiguity, tackling incomplete systems, and applying hands-on engineering experience to security challenges.




STYLE POINTS

 - Familiarity with crypto or DeFi systems and their unique security challenges

 - Familiarity with threat modeling frameworks and cloud-native security tooling




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) - detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will

source_jobs.title: Senior Sales Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE JOB

Senior Sales Manager

Turnkey https://www.turnkey.com/ is pioneering a next-generation key-management and wallet-infrastructure API designed for security, flexibility, and developer-first ease. Founded by the team that scaled Coinbase Custody from zero to more than $100 billion in assets under custody, Turnkey is rewriting the rules of crypto infrastructure by tackling core security at its foundational level. Their platform enables developers and enterprises to build embedded wallets, AI agent–driven flows, programmable key management, and at-scale transaction services — unlocking mass-market crypto adoption.

Developers stay fully in charge of their keys while gaining the kind of protection trusted by leading financial institutions. At Turnkey, you’ll be building the backbone of the next wave of digital innovation. With a focus on security, transparency, and control, the company isn’t just creating tools — it’s shaping the infrastructure that will let crypto evolve openly, collaboratively, and at scale.




HIGHLIGHTS:

 - HQ: New York City

 - Total Funding: Turnkey has raised over US$50 million in venture capital to date.

 - Backed by top-tier investors: Sequoia Capital, Lightspeed Faction, Galaxy Ventures, Bain Capital Crypto

 - Named: CNBC’s World’s Top FinTech Companies (2025)

 - Milestones that matter:

 - Billions in assets secured

 - Power over 50M embedded wallets and sign millions of transactions every week

 - The crypto infrastructure for 100+ next-generation companies

 - Clients include: Bridge, Magic Eden, Polymarket, Axiom, Alchemy, and Moonshot




ABOUT THE ROLE:

As one of Turnkey’s earliest sales leaders, you’ll own team development, coaching, and performance for a pod of up to 10 sellers. You will help shape the foundation of the sales organization, strengthen the outbound and pipeline motion, and partner cross-functionally with leadership to refine the go-to-market strategy.

 - Lead and mentor a team of AEs and BDRs

 - Drive consistent attainment across mid-market and enterprise segments.

 - Build repeatable, scalable sales processes as Turnkey enters its next growth stage.

 - Work closely with leadership to refine segmentation as pipeline matures.

 - Ensure pipeline quality, strong forecasting discipline, and predictable execution.

 - Partner with marketing and product to strengthen market traction.

 - Create clear promotion paths and manage career growth across pods.

 - Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and high performance.




ABOUT YOU:

This role is ideal for a high-EQ people leader who has already proven themselves as a strong Sales Manager and is ready to step into a Senior Sales Manager scope.

 - 3+ years of sales leadership experience managing AEs (mid-market and/or enterprise) and ideally BDRs.

 - Proven track record building and leading high-performing sales teams in fast-growth environments.

 - Strong coaching instincts and high EQ; able to elevate underperformers and accelerate top talent.

 - Experience operating in an early-stage, unstructured environment where playbooks are still being built.

 - Comfortable managing pipeline, forecasting, segmentation, and process improvements.

 - Ability to work cross-functionally with Product, Marketing, and Leadership.

 - Motivated by autonomy, ownership, and helping build a sales org from the ground up.

 - A builder at heart—you enjoy creating scalable systems, not just running existing ones.

 - Located in the NYC area and open to hybrid work.




BONUS POINTS

 - You’re an active participant in the crypto ecosystem, staying on top of emerging trends and protocols.

 - Experience selling and leading enterprise and mid-market teams across fintech verticals




THE EXTRAS THAT MATTER:

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k)

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we'll actually encourage you to use it)

 - $3,000/year learning and development budg

source_jobs.title: Head of Revenue Operations
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE JOB

This is a hands-on, foundational role supporting an expanding go-to-market function. You’ll work closely with senior leadership to build the systems, processes, and insights that drive predictable and efficient revenue growth.

If you thrive in environments where you can create structure, improve workflows, and help teams move faster with clarity — this role is for you.




HIGHLIGHTS:

 - Well-capitalized with strong long-term backing and high-profile VCs

 - High-growth tech company expanding rapidly

 - Recognized as a fast-scaling innovator in its sector

 - Experienced founders and leadership team with deep industry expertise

 - Early enough to have real ownership, established enough to scale with confidence




ABOUT THE ROLE:

This is a hands-on role that works directly with the Founders and GTM leaders to create systems, processes, and insights that drive predictable and efficient revenue growth.

 - Report to the VP of Revenue

 - Build RevOps strategy across the full funnel: marketing, sales, onboarding, and customer success

 - Map, design, and optimize GTM workflows to improve conversion, handoffs, and customer experience

 - Build, own, and implement plan to continuously grow and accelerate conversion rates across each step of funnel

 - Own, manage, and proactively update growth forecast model (including leadership team updates)

 - Leverage competitive intelligence to improve conversion rates, forecasting, analyses, and broader rev ops strategy

 - Own the evaluation, implementation, and management of RevOps tools (CRM, automation, analytics, enablement)

 - Ensure data integrity and create a single source of truth for GTM metrics

 - Build dashboards, reporting, and insights that drive decisions and highlight opportunities

 - Monitor funnel performance, pipeline health, and revenue KPIs — and recommend improvements

 - Build the operational backbone for onboarding, training, and GTM playbooks

 - Support reps and CS with workflows, automation, and clear processes that reduce friction

 - Provide actionable insights to Sales, CS, and Marketing




ABOUT YOU:

You’re someone who can build a RevOps foundation from the ground up — and you thrive on bringing clarity, structure, and efficiency to fast-moving teams. You’ll work across everything from day-to-day operations to strategic planning, always with a builder’s mindset: simplify, streamline, execute.

 - 3+ years of experience, including 1–2 years in management consulting or 1–2 years in Business Operations/Strategy at a high-growth startup

 - Experience as a solo RevOps operator — comfortable being both strategic and hands-on

 - Strong command of CRM systems (HubSpot or Salesforce) and go-to-market tools

 - Analytical mindset with the ability to turn data into strategy

 - Deep understanding of SaaS revenue models, customer journey, and pipeline management

 - Exceptional communicator who can influence without authority

 - You’re passionate about leading projects and working cross-functionally, with experience in operational and analytical work




THE EXTRAS THAT MATTER:

 - Comprehensive benefits package

 - Paid parental leave

 - Flexible time-off policy with encouragement to recharge

 - Annual learning and development budget

 - Regular team off-sites and connection opportunities

 - Modern equipment and home office support

 - Additional perks based on location and role

source_jobs.title: Founding Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TURNKEY

Turnkey is the wallet infrastructure powering the next era of the internet. Founded by the team that built Coinbase Custody, Turnkey gives companies secure, flexible, and programmable key management so they can launch world class crypto products without ever touching private keys. Our customers include leading fintechs, payment companies, AI platforms, and global enterprises building wallets, payments, rewards, remittances, and more.

We are backed by Sequoia, Galaxy, Bain Crypto, and the leaders who built the modern crypto ecosystem.

We operate as a lean organization where each person is empowered to take full ownership over their work and results. Our company is low on hierarchy and unnecessary meetings, and high on personal agency.




THE ROLE

We’re hiring our first BDRs to fuel pipeline generation across high value segments. This is not a “spray and pray” outbound role. You’ll become an expert on wallet infra, understand how top companies enter the crypto ecosystem, and run thoughtful outreach that sparks high value conversations for our Enterprise AEs and leadership team.

You’ll work directly with the VP of Revenue, CEO, and AEs to shape the top of the funnel and help define the outbound engine from the ground up. If you get energy from 0 to 1 building, this is it.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and refine targeted outbound strategies into high value verticals.

 - Research prospects deeply and craft messages that speak to their roadmap, pain points, and potential crypto strategy.

 - Create and manage early stage pipeline in Salesforce and support weekly pipeline reviews with the revenue team.

 - Qualify inbound interest, run first touch discovery, and prep AEs to advance high quality opportunities.

 - Collaborate with product, partnerships, and marketing to shape messaging, personas, and outbound campaigns.

 - Bring structured feedback from customers and the market to GTM leadership.

 - Constantly experiment, iterate, and help build the playbook for outbound at Turnkey.

 - Go above and beyond to fuel our GTM engine.
   


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1 to 3 years in BDR, SDR, or similar outbound roles (startup or fintech/crypto experience is a plus, but not required).

 - Strong written communication: crisp, thoughtful outreach that feels personalized and strategic.

 - High curiosity for crypto, payments, fintech, or developer products.

 - Ability to simplify complex technical concepts and tell a clear story.

 - Competitive, motivated resilient, and hungry to build something new

 - Comfortable working directly with founders, senior leaders, and enterprise stakeholders.

 - Bias for action: you move fast, ask smart questions, and figure things out.
   


WHY JOIN US

 - Work with a world class founding team with deep domain expertise.

 - Direct line to leadership: your work directly shapes our pipeline and revenue engine.

 - Massive market: Turnkey sits at the intersection of fintech, payments, AI, and global commerce.

 - Real ownership and upward mobility: early BDRs have the opportunity to touch many parts of the business and through high performance, can grow into AEs, partnerships, or strategic roles as the team scales.

 - Highly collaborative, fast moving environment built for people who want to win.

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Turnkey https://www.turnkey.com/ is pioneering a next-generation key-management and wallet-infrastructure API designed for security, flexibility, and developer-first ease. Founded by the team that scaled Coinbase Custody from zero to more than $100 billion in assets under custody, Turnkey is rewriting the rules of crypto infrastructure by tackling core security at its foundational level. Their platform enables developers and enterprises to build embedded wallets, AI agent–driven flows, programmable key management, and at-scale transaction services — unlocking mass-market crypto adoption.

Developers stay fully in charge of their keys while gaining the kind of protection trusted by leading financial institutions. At Turnkey, you’ll be building the backbone of the next wave of digital innovation. With a focus on security, transparency, and control, the company isn’t just creating tools — it’s shaping the infrastructure that will let crypto evolve openly, collaboratively, and at scale.




YOUR ROLE

As an Enterprise Account Executive at Turnkey, you will be one of the earliest sales hires, responsible for driving revenue growth by building our enterprise business from the ground up. You’ll own the full sales cycle; from pipeline generation and outreach to deal strategy, negotiation, and close; while navigating long, complex sales processes with some of the largest and most sophisticated enterprises in the world.

This role requires the ability to operate in uncharted territory: exploring new verticals, creating new lines of business, and forging relationships with senior executives at Fortune 500 companies, financial institutions, and leading technology firms. You’ll combine technical fluency with enterprise-level selling skills to help customers understand how Turnkey can become mission-critical to their infrastructure.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build the Enterprise Motion: Establish Turnkey’s presence in the enterprise market, identifying new verticals and high-value opportunities.

 - Own Full Sales Cycle: Drive deals end-to-end—prospect, qualify, run technical discovery, design solutions, negotiate contracts, and close.

 - Craft Deal Strategies: Develop creative approaches for first-of-kind, complex deals; align cross-functional stakeholders internally and externally.

 - Engage the C-Suite: Build trusted relationships with senior decision makers (CIO, CTO, CISO, CFO) at the world’s largest enterprises.

 - Navigate Complex Products: Translate technical capabilities (APIs, security models, integrations) into clear business value for diverse stakeholders.

 - Influence GTM & Product: Partner closely with founders, exec, Product, and Engineering—bringing market insights back to shape our roadmap.

 - Represent Turnkey Externally: Act as an ambassador at industry events, conferences, and in strategic networks.


WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 8+ years of enterprise sales experience, including proven success in building net-new business in complex technical sales.

 - Strong track record of closing large, multi-stakeholder enterprise deals with long sales cycles.

 - Ability to engage credibly with both technical teams (developers, security engineers) and business leaders (C-suite, finance).

 - Experience selling APIs, infrastructure, or highly technical SaaS products is a plus.

 - Entrepreneurial, self-starter mindset with the ability to thrive in ambiguity and build systems from scratch.

 - Exceptional executive presence, communication, and relationship-building skills.

 - Comfort working cross-functionally with Product, Legal, Risk, and Finance teams.
   
   


STYLE POINTS

 - Experience at a high-growth startup or scaling a new vertical within a larger organization.

 - Crypto, fintech, or security infrastructure background preferred.

 - Technical proficiency and curiosity about developer tools, APIs, or cryptography.

 - Biased towards action & a one-team mentality.


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dent

source_jobs.title: Head of Finance
source_jobs.description:
Your role

As the Head of Finance at Turnkey, you will own and lead the finance function end-to-end, partnering closely with the COO, CEO, and executive team to ensure the company’s financial foundation scales with the business. You will be the senior financial leader responsible for building durable, audit-ready systems while also acting as a strategic thought partner—translating complex financial realities into clear guidance for decision-making.

This is a hands-on builder role for a seasoned operator who is excited to design finance for a fast-growing, usage-based infrastructure company. You’ll balance rigor with speed, bringing structure where it matters most while enabling Turnkey to move quickly, invest confidently, and grow responsibly.



What you’ll do

 - Own the end-to-end finance function at Turnkey, including accounting, FP&A, tax, audit, and compliance

 - Build and formalize controllership processes appropriate for a venture-backed company

 - Oversee and optimize relationships with outsourced accounting, tax, audit, and advisory partners

 - Manage and mentor existing finance talent, including a strong FP&A / strategic finance lead

 - Own budgeting, forecasting, and operating models, translating financial data into business insights

 - Maintain financial governance, controls, and audit readiness as the company scales

 - Oversee Turnkey’s usage-based billing and invoicing infrastructure, partnering with Product and Engineering

 - Evaluate, implement, and improve finance systems and tooling (ERP, billing, reporting)

 - Anticipate future needs related to compliance, tax, and financial risk — and proactively prepare for them



What we’re looking for

 - Prior experience leading finance at a Series C or later stage startup or scaleup

 - Strong background in controllership and operational finance (hands-on or closely adjacent)

 - Experience managing audits, tax strategy, and regulatory requirements

 - Comfort operating in complex billing environments; usage-based or consumption models strongly preferred

 - Track record of building or modernizing finance processes and systems

 - Ability to operate both strategically and tactically in a fast-moving environment

 - High judgment, attention to detail, and comfort navigating ambiguity



Style points

 - Experience with usage-based or consumption-based billing models

 - Exposure to crypto, fintech, infrastructure, or security-focused businesses

 - Experience scaling finance teams and mentoring senior finance talent

 - Familiarity with modern finance tooling and automation



What we offer

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) — detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO

source_jobs.title: Recruiter
source_jobs.description:
YOUR ROLE

As a Recruiter at Turnkey, you’ll own the full recruiting lifecycle - from sourcing and outreach through to offer and close - across technical and business roles. You’ll partner closely with hiring managers to ensure smooth, fast-moving processes, deliver an exceptional candidate experience, and raise the bar for every hire we make.

You’ll also be a builder: refining our systems, strengthening our employer brand, and creating the recruiting foundation that will scale with the company as we continue our rapid growth.

This is a high-impact, high-visibility role ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, loves designing systems, and takes pride in running exceptionally tight processes.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Manage searches end-to-end: source, screen, interview, and close top candidates across multiple departments

 - Build trusted relationships with hiring managers to deeply understand role needs and ensure alignment throughout the process

 - Source creatively and strategically to identify talent beyond traditional channels

 - Own candidate experience from first touch through close, ensuring every interaction reflects Turnkey’s standards of excellence

 - Maintain organized, high-quality data and reporting within our ATS

 - Partner with leadership to forecast hiring needs and define hiring plans

 - Strengthen Turnkey’s employer brand through thoughtful storytelling and consistent messaging

 - Continuously refine recruiting processes to increase efficiency, speed, and quality of hire

 - Experiment, measure, and improve; help Turnkey develop a recruiting engine built to scale




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience, ideally within a high-growth technology company

 - Proven track record of successfully closing candidates across technical and business functions

 - Highly organized and systems-oriented; you naturally bring structure to fast-moving environments

 - Comfortable managing multiple roles at once without sacrificing quality or attention to detail

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills

 - Relentlessly hardworking, resourceful, and committed to finding and winning the best talent

 - Strong judgment and ability to represent Turnkey with professionalism and warmth

 - Deep interest in startups, technology, and helping great people find meaningful work




STYLE POINTS

 - Existing network within fintech, crypto, or developer-focused companies

 - Strong understanding of compensation benchmarking and offer strategy

 - Experience implementing or improving ATS workflows, specifically with Ashby

 - A natural storyteller who can convey Turnkey’s mission and values authentically




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) — detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will force you to take time off!)

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple team offsites per year

 - Macbook Pro laptop

 - Lunch stipend


Ready to join us on this journey? Email us at jobs@turnkey.com with your LinkedIn profile and a short overview of why you'd be a great fit for Turnkey.



Turnkey is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage individuals of all backgrounds to apply.

source_jobs.title: Head of People
source_jobs.description:
Your role

As the Head of People at Turnkey, you will take full ownership of the People function from the COO. You will be the fully independent functional leader responsible for building, scaling, and leading all people-related operations across the company. This includes everything from talent acquisition strategy and People Operations (HRIS, compliance, benefits) to performance management, compensation, and executive coaching.



This is a critical, hands-on builder and executor role perfect for an experienced leader who is excited to build a world-class, high-agency culture grounded in scalable processes. You will ensure our People strategy directly supports the business objectives of rapid growth and operational excellence.



What you’ll do

 - Own and build all People functions (talent, HRBP, People Ops)

 - Own and continually improve performance management, leveling, and compensation frameworks

 - Partner with Finance on headcount planning, compensation strategy, and organizational design

 - Develop managers and support executive leadership growth

 - Build scalable talent acquisition processes and systems

 - Strengthen culture through clarity, programs, and high standards

 - Ensure People operations run smoothly, compliantly, and with minimal bureaucracy

 - Mentor and grow a small but mighty People team



What we’re looking for

 - 7+ years of experience in People / HR roles, including 2+ years in a senior leadership position (Head of / VP) at a high-growth technology company

 - Demonstrated experience as an executor and builder who has personally implemented core systems and processes

 - Broad exposure to all aspects of People / HR: talent, HRBP, People Ops, compensation

 - Strong operator: structured, organized, pragmatic, and systems-oriented

 - High agency, first-principles thinker who is comfortable coaching and pushing executives



Style points

 - Experience in fintech, crypto, or B2B SaaS

 - Expert knowledge of employment law and compliance



What we offer

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) — detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple team offsites per year

 - Macbook Pro laptop

 - Lunch stipend



Ready to join us on this journey? Email us at jobs@turnkey.com with your LinkedIn profile and a short overview of why you'd be a great fit for Turnkey.

Turnkey is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage individuals of all backgrounds to apply.

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
Product Manager

Turnkey is a key management API optimized for security, flexibility, and ease-of-use. Founded by the leaders who scaled Coinbase Custody from 0 to a $100M+ ARR business, Turnkey is rewriting the rules of crypto infrastructure by tackling core security at its foundational level. We are building a platform that empowers developers to unlock the next wave of mass-market crypto applications, solving the challenge of secure, flexible key management.

Much like AWS transformed computing with the advent of cloud, Turnkey is the trustless, transparent, and decentralized infrastructure that will transform development in crypto.




YOUR ROLE

As an early product hire at Turnkey, you will play a pivotal role in the evolution of our existing product, and entry into new product verticals, including:

 - Establish 0 to 1 vision for new product verticals

 - Evolve our existing developer-first product offering across APIs, SDKs, and our developer dashboard

 - Work closely with customers to understand their goals, criteria, and future plans

 - Work hand-in-hand with our engineering and leadership team to execute on our product vision




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 5+ years of relevant product experience; crypto and dev tooling experience a plus

 - Comfort with technical challenges, and an opinionated view on the evolution of key management, wallets, and crypto UX

 - Ability to stretch outside of the traditional product role to do whatever it takes to ensure our product is successful

 - Experience driving both individual work and managing others

 - Direct and open written and verbal communication

 - Willingness to challenge the status quo and preconceived notions of what’s possible

 - People who think that Web3 / cryptocurrency has the potential to radically change the world for the better and a sincere desire to help facilitate that change




STYLE POINTS

 - A self-proclaimed crypto degen who actively tracks developments in the crypto ecosystem

 - Prior entrepreneurial experience




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Full benefits, including medical, dental, vision, life, disability, HSA/FSA, 401(k) - detailed benefits overview available as we get further in the process

 - Paid parental leave

 - Unlimited PTO (and we will force you to take time off!)

 - $3,000/yr learning and development budget to attend industry conferences

 - Multiple team offsites per year

 - Macbook Pro laptop

 - Lunch stipend (for those physically in the New York City office)



Please note that while the team is remote, we are only considering candidates who are physically based in the United States and Canada with a strong preference for those who are able to work onsite in our New York City HQ.



Turnkey is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We encourage individuals of all backgrounds to apply.

notes: High-growth crypto infrastructure company with strong engineering focus
